UpdateAsp.name: Auto snapshot policy name, supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /., must start with a letter, length 1-65
UpdateAsp.timePoints: Snapshot time points within a day, valid values: 0-23
UpdateAsp.repeatWeekdays: Snapshot days within a week, valid values: 0-6
UpdateAsp.retentionDays: Retention days for auto snapshots, set to -1 for permanent retention
